---
title: "Highlights"
pagetitle: "Highlights — DigiPols"
toc: false
listing:
  contents: highlights
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  date-format: "YYYY · MM · DD"
  categories: true
  feed: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <h1 style="font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 3.6rem); line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: -0.03em; font-weight: 500; max-width: 22ch; margin: 0;">News, project launches and lab events.</h1>
  <p class="lede">Things happening at the lab — new grants, public talks, software releases, Forum gatherings and select press coverage.</p>
</div>
```
